scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.install:all: cd apps/api && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/web && npm run typecheck && cd ../api && npm run typecheck
